SEARCH
Package wzlib

Class WzImage

java.lang.Object
wzlib.WzObject
wzlib.WzImage
All Implemented Interfaces:
Closeable, AutoCloseable
public class WzImage extends WzObject
WZ 檔案中的圖像節點，包含屬性列表。 An image node in a WZ file, containing a list of properties.

Ported from: MapleLib/WzLib/WzImage.cs

      IOException
